pi_items.source: Web search confirmed Adverse Possession is a real topic in American Jurisprudence 2d; task.json description also specifies this article title
Web search of legal encyclopedias and Thomson Reuters publications
Multiple web search results confirm American Jurisprudence 2d is the Second edition
Web search result from Scribd (Adverse Possession 3 Am Jur 2d) and multiple legal research guides confirm Adverse Possession is in Volume 3
Multiple web search results confirm Thomson Reuters West (or West Publishing Company) is the publisher of American Jurisprudence 2d
Could not find specific confirmation of 2023 publication date in search results; American Jurisprudence 2d is continuously updated with pocket parts and replacement volumes
Web search result 'Adverse Possession 3 Am Jur 2d' indicates Adverse Possession section spans pages 79-359 in Volume 3
Web search results show American Jurisprudence 2d volumes are credited to 'Editorial Staff of the Publishers' rather than individual named authors
Web search results for 'John Smith' + American Jurisprudence + adverse possession returned no specific author match; Amazon results credit Editorial Staff

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data asking an agent to manually add an encyclopedia reference entry to Jurism's database. The article topic 'Adverse Possession' is real and exists in American Jurisprudence (full title: American Jurisprudence 2d), published by Thomson Reuters West. The article is confirmed to be in Volume 3. However, the author specified as 'John Smith' contradicts documented practice: American Jurisprudence 2d articles are credited to the Editorial Staff, not individual named authors. The page range of 120-145 also contradicts the verified full page range of 79-359 for this topic in Volume 3.
